scripts.build: pnpm catalog:generate && pnpm catalog:validate && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@ai-assistant/config --filter=@ai-assistant/types --filter=@ai-assistant/icons --filter=@ai-assistant/telemetry --filter=@ai-assistant/events --filter=@ai-assistant/tool-schema --filter=@ai-assistant/permissions --filter=@ai-assistant/capabilities --filter=@ai-assistant/connectors --filter=@ai-assistant/platform --filter=@ai-assistant/workflows --filter=@ai-assistant/integration-runtime --filter=@ai-assistant/feature-flags --filter=@ai-assistant/database --filter=@ai-assistant/auth --filter=@ai-assistant/gateway --filter=@ai-assistant/sdk --filter=@ai-assistant/tool-runtime --filter=@ai-assistant/capability-runtime
scripts.dev:gateway: node scripts/with-env.mjs node scripts/dev.mjs serve gateway
scripts.dev:ai-runtime: node scripts/with-env.mjs node scripts/dev.mjs serve ai-runtime
